text.title: raci-matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for raci-matrix as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: A=R for the senior role on every task.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs and inexperienced PMs assign A=R to the project lead because charters say "PM owns delivery". The Accountable should not be doing the work — that conflation breaks the escalation chain.

failure-mode.description: Assigning C to every named role "to be thorough".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every C requires a feedback round-trip. A matrix with 8 Consulted per task is a meeting schedule, not a responsibility model. Set an explicit cap (3-4 C per task) in the generation prompt.

failure-mode.description: Storing RACI only in Confluence with no version history.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Role changes are invisible without diffs. Keep RACI in source control as CSV; generate Markdown view for Confluence. Agents should output a unified diff when updating, not a full rewrite.

failure-mode.description: Agent silently fixes violations by reassigning roles without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every role change has organizational implications. Violations must surface to the human Accountable for resolution — the agent flags but never resolves autonomously.
